learning_steps: Learn HTML5 document structure: doctype, html, head, body, meta tags
Master semantic elements: header, nav, article, section, aside, footer
Understand forms and input types: text, email, number, date, file, validations
Work with tables, lists, and multimedia: audio, video, canvas
Build a multi-page static portfolio website using only HTML
Learn the box model: content, padding, border, margin
Master Flexbox and Grid layout: justify-content, align-items, grid-template
Understand CSS specificity, inheritance, and cascade order
Work with CSS animations, transitions, and keyframes
Practice responsive design with media queries and clamp()/min()/max()
Build a pixel-perfect clone of a popular landing page
Learn ES6+ fundamentals: let/const, arrow functions, template literals
Master asynchronous JS: Promises, async/await, fetch API, event loop
Understand the DOM API, event delegation, and event bubbling
Work with Array methods: map, filter, reduce, find, sort
Practice closures, this binding, and prototype chain
Build an interactive weather dashboard using a public API
Learn JSX, components, props, and state with useState/useEffect
Master the React lifecycle and hooks: useMemo, useCallback, useRef, useReducer
Understand state management: Context API, lifting state up
Work with React Router for SPA navigation
Practice handling forms: controlled components, validation libraries
Build a full CRUD todo app with local storage persistence
Learn basic types: string, number, boolean, arrays, tuples, enums
Master interfaces, type aliases, and union/intersection types
Understand generics, conditional types, and mapped types
Work with type narrowing, type guards, and assertions
Practice typing React components: props, events, hooks
Migrate a small JavaScript project to TypeScript
Learn core commands: init, add, commit, status, log, diff
Master branching and merging: branch, checkout, merge, rebase
Understand remote workflows: clone, push, pull, fetch, remote
Work with advanced features: cherry-pick, stash, bisect, tags
Practice collaborative workflows: pull requests, code review, merge conflicts
Set up a CI/CD pipeline that runs on every git push
Learn mobile-first vs desktop-first approaches
Master CSS media queries: min-width, max-width, orientation
Understand relative units: rem, em, vw, vh, percentage, fr
Work with CSS frameworks: Tailwind, Bootstrap utilities for responsiveness
Practice accessibility: touch targets, font scaling, color contrast
Build a responsive dashboard that looks native on mobile and desktop
Learn HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE and status codes
Master JSON data format and request/response headers
Understand REST principles: statelessness, resource-based URLs, HATEOAS
Work with authentication: API keys, Bearer tokens, JWT, OAuth 2.0
Practice with public APIs: fetch weather, currency, GitHub data
Build and document a REST API using FastAPI or Express
Learn Python syntax: variables, data types, control flow, functions
Master data structures: lists, dicts, sets, comprehensions, generators
Understand OOP: classes, inheritance, dunder methods, dataclasses
Work with modules: virtualenv, pip, requirements.txt, package management
Practice file I/O, decorators, context managers, and async/await
Build a CLI expense tracker using SQLite and argparse
Learn CRUD operations: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE with WHERE clauses
Master JOINs: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL, and CROSS JOINs
Understand aggregation: GROUP BY, HAVING, COUNT, SUM, AVG, window functions
Work with subqueries, CTEs (WITH clause), and derived tables
Practice indexing, EXPLAIN plans, and query optimization
Build a library management database with complex reports
Learn Docker basics: images, containers, layers, Dockerfile syntax
Master multi-stage builds and image optimization
Understand Docker Compose: services, networks, volumes, depends_on
Work with container registries: Docker Hub, ECR, GHCR
Practice debugging containers, health checks, and Docker networking
Containerize a full-stack app: frontend, backend, and database
Learn path operations: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with type hints
Master Pydantic models: request/response validation, nested schemas
Understand dependency injection, background tasks, and middleware
Work with async database access: SQLAlchemy async, asyncpg
Practice authentication: OAuth2 password flow, JWT tokens
Build a production-ready API with auto-generated docs, tests, and deployment
Learn PostgreSQL-specific features: JSONB, arrays, ranges, UUIDs
Master advanced SQL: CTEs, recursive queries, lateral joins
Understand indexing: B-tree, GIN, GiST, partial and expression indexes
Work with transactions, isolation levels, and concurrency control
Practice backup, restore, pg_dump, and replication concepts
Design a normalized schema with constraints, triggers, and stored procedures
Learn shell navigation: ls, cd, cat, grep, find, sed, awk
Master file permissions: chmod, chown, ACLs, root/sudo usage
Understand process management: ps, top, systemctl, cron, log management
Work with networking: ifconfig, netstat, ss, iptables, DNS config
Practice shell scripting: variables, loops, functions, error handling
Set up a web server: install nginx, configure SSL, deploy an app
Learn core concepts: supervised vs unsupervised, bias-variance, overfitting
Master preprocessing: standardization, encoding, imputation, feature scaling
Understand algorithms: linear/logistic regression, decision trees, SVM, k-means
Work with model evaluation: cross-validation, precision/recall, ROC-AUC, confusion matrix
Practice pipelines and hyperparameter tuning with Grid/Random Search
Build an end-to-end ML pipeline from data exploration to model deployment
Learn DataFrames and Series: creation, indexing, slicing, filtering
Master data manipulation: groupby, merge, concat, pivot, melt
Understand data cleaning: handling duplicates, missing data, datatypes
Work with time series: datetime parsing, resampling, rolling windows
Practice I/O: CSV, Excel, SQL, JSON, Parquet formats
Analyze a real-world dataset and produce an insights report
Learn ndarrays: creation, shape, dtype, slicing, boolean indexing
Master broadcasting rules and vectorized operations
Understand universal functions (ufuncs) and linear algebra operations
Work with random sampling, statistical distributions, and masking
Practice memory-efficient array operations vs Python lists
Implement matrix operations from scratch using NumPy
Learn descriptive stats: mean, median, mode, std dev, percentiles
Master probability distributions: normal, binomial, Poisson, uniform
Understand inferential stats: confidence intervals, hypothesis testing, p-values
Work with correlation, causation, and regression analysis (OLS, multiple)
Practice A/B testing design: sample size, power, significance, effect size
Apply statistical tests to a business dataset and draw actionable conclusions
Learn matplotlib basics: figures, subplots, styles, colors, annotations
Master seaborn for statistical plots: distplot, boxplot, heatmap, pairplot
Understand interactive visualization with Plotly or Bokeh
Work with dashboards: Dash, Streamlit, or Panel for web deployment
Practice best practices: color theory, avoiding chart junk, accessibility
Build a public-facing analytics dashboard with real-world data
Learn the estimator API: fit, predict, transform, pipelines
Master preprocessing: StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder, ColumnTransformer
Understand algorithms: RandomForest, XGBoost, LogisticRegression, KMeans, PCA
Work with model evaluation: GridSearchCV, cross_validate, classification_report
Practice feature engineering: polynomial features, feature selection, importance
Build a complete ML workflow and serialize the model with joblib and FastAPI
Learn K8s architecture: pods, nodes, control plane, etcd, kubelet
Master workload resources: Deployments, ReplicaSets, StatefulSets, DaemonSets
Understand networking: Services, Ingress, DNS, NetworkPolicies
Work with storage: PV, PVC, StorageClasses, configmaps, secrets
Practice operations: kubectl, helm, rolling updates, rollbacks, health checks
Deploy a multi-service app with auto-scaling and self-healing on a local cluster
Learn CI/CD concepts: build, test, lint, deploy stages and artifacts
Master GitHub Actions: workflows, triggers, reusable actions, matrices
Understand pipeline as code: YAML structure, environment variables, secrets
Work with testing automation: unit tests, integration tests, coverage gates
Practice deployment strategies: Blue/Green, Canary, Rolling, Feature flags
Set up a full pipeline: build Docker image, run tests, push to registry, deploy to staging
Learn IAM: users, groups, roles, policies, MFA, least privilege
Master core services: EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, CloudWatch, Route53
Understand VPC: subnets, ACLs, security groups, NAT gateway, peering
Work with managed services: API Gateway, SNS, SQS, EventBridge
Practice infrastructure as code: CloudFormation or Terraform for AWS resources
Deploy a serverless REST API with Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB
Learn HCL syntax: variables, locals, outputs, resources, data sources
Master state management: remote state backends, workspaces, state locking
Understand modules: creating reusable modules, module sources, versioning
Work with provisioning: provisioners, null resources, depends_on logic
Practice planning and applying safely: terraform plan, targeted apply, taint
Provision a complete 3-tier infrastructure: app server, database, load balancer
Learn neural network fundamentals: perceptrons, activation functions, backpropagation
Master CNNs for computer vision: convolution, pooling, dropout, batch norm
Understand sequence models: RNNs, LSTMs, GRUs, attention mechanisms
Work with transfer learning and pre-trained models: ResNet, BERT, GPT-style
Practice training: learning rate scheduling, early stopping, mixed precision
Train and deploy an image classifier using PyTorch or TensorFlow
Learn TensorFlow/Keras basics: layers, models, compile, fit, evaluate
Master the functional API for multi-input/multi-output architectures
Understand custom training loops, callbacks, and metrics
Work with TF.data pipeline: mapping, batching, prefetching, cache
Practice model saving/loading: SavedModel format, TensorFlow Serving
Build and deploy a text classification model using TF and Keras
Learn ML lifecycle: experimentation, reproducibility, packaging, deployment
Master model versioning: MLflow, DVC for tracking experiments and artifacts
Understand CI/CD for ML: data validation, model testing, canary deployments
Work with serving: REST APIs, batch inference, feature stores (Feast)
Practice monitoring: model drift, data drift, latency, whylogs or Evidently
Set up an end-to-end MLOps pipeline with experiment tracking, registry, and serving
Learn Node.js event loop, non-blocking I/O, and module system (CommonJS/ESM)
Master Express.js: routing, middleware, error handling, template engines
Understand async patterns: callbacks, promises, streams, EventEmitter
Work with databases: Mongoose (MongoDB), Sequelize (SQL), Prisma ORM
Practice authentication: Passport.js, JWT, bcrypt, session management
Build a real-time chat application with Socket.IO and Redis pub/sub
